abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} to identify or detect mystic forces, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.05909d6310d209a6]{Make a Connection}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.8704c945023355fb]{Test Your Relationship} with a fellow mystic or mystical being, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by studying someone or something in a charged situation, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. When you also pierce the veil to explore deeper truths (decide before rolling), you may reroll any dice. If you do, count a weak hit as a miss.
